# HealthspanWire — Full AI Content Index

Primary llms descriptor: {{ '/llms.txt' | absolute_url }}
AI policy: {{ '/ai-policy/' | absolute_url }}
Updated: {{ site.time | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}

## Site Summary
{{ site.description }}

## Canonical Sections
- Home: {{ '/' | absolute_url }}
- Signal Tracker: {{ '/signals/' | absolute_url }}
- Monthly Reports: {{ '/monthly-reports/' | absolute_url }}
- Articles: {{ '/articles/' | absolute_url }}
- Newsletter: {{ '/newsletter/' | absolute_url }}

## Articles
{% for post in site.posts %}
### {{ post.title }}
- URL: {{ post.url | absolute_url }}
- Date: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
- Author: {{ post.author | default: site.author }}
- Categories: {{ post.categories | join: ", " }}
- Tags: {{ post.tags | join: ", " }}
- Description: {{ post.description | default: post.excerpt | markdownify | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | truncate: 320 }}

{% endfor %}
